title: Junior Instructional Designer at MT Educare Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at MT Educare Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MT Educare Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About MT Educare Global Group:
MT Educare Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
